brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer with valid math (41.6 vs 62.4 days); goes beyond calculation to explain the logarithmic vs linear scaling dynamic, tracing why τ dominates R₀ — a genuine second-order insight; reasoning proceeds linearly with no meta-commentary on assumptions, biases, or potential pitfalls; shows clear derivation in table form but does not verify by back-substituting t into R(t) or approaching from a different angle; presents all conclusions as certain without acknowledging model assumptions (e.g., that Ebbinghaus applies to brand recall, that τ is constant) or real-world limitations; mentions the reach-vs-retention tradeoff as context but does not evaluate alternative framings or what different parameter combinations would imply; full derivation is shown with formula rearrangement, substituted values, and intermediate results — entirely reproducible by a third party.
